description_long: This is a vintage-style flatbed tractor truck with a deep red cab and a wooden cargo bed. The front features a rounded grille with vertical slats, classic circular headlights, and a split windshield. The cab is enclosed with two doors, side mirrors, and a simple, utilitarian design. The rear cargo area is constructed from wooden planks and framed with wooden rails, suitable for transporting goods or equipment. The wheels are solid with red-painted rims, and the overall build suggests a robust, heavy-duty vehicle. The design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century utility trucks, often seen in rural or urban delivery roles.
description: A vintage red flatbed tractor truck with an enclosed cab and wooden cargo bed, featuring classic rounded styling and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded grille, split windshield, and circular headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the enclosed cab, wooden cargo bed, and red wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open wooden cargo bed and rear wooden rails.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cab, bed, and wheel arrangement.
attribute_wheel_configuration: four wheels, all similar size, likely two-wheel drive
attribute_cabin_design: Enclosed cab with two doors, front windshield, side windows, and basic ergonomic features; no visible ROPS or advanced comfort elements.
